writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your hobbies
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your hobbies and free time activities.
writing.sampleAnswer: I usually read books and listen to music in my free time. I love to travel, and I also like to play games. My sister likes to paint and watch TV.
checklist: Nêu được ít nhất 3 sở thích
Có thể nhắc đến sở thích của người khác

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Review — A typical day
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) describing a typical day, combining Present Simple, frequency adverbs, and prepositions of time from Chương 3.
writing.sampleAnswer: I always wake up at six in the morning. I am a teacher, and I teach English in the afternoon. I rarely watch TV at night. I usually read books instead, and on weekends I sometimes garden.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 4 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 3
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu
